title: Lucid Realms
description:
Adds dreams & nightmares to the game.
*very much unfinished
body:
# **Features**
## Dreams & Nightmares
33.33% chance you will have a dream or nightmare.
## Dream Variants
This mod adds tons of versions of blocks in their dream/nightmare form! You can also craft dreamstone/dreadstone stairs, slabs, & bricks.
### Dreamstone & Dreadstone
Dreamstone is the dream equivalent of cobblestone. Dreadstone is the nightmare equivalent of cobblestone.
### Dream Wood Type
You can find dream trees in a dream and craft dream planks from the logs. From dream planks you can craft other wood items
### Soulflare
Soulflare is the dream & nightmare form of glowstone. You can craft it from soul shards which currently only drop for Soulflare blocks.
## Structures
You can find a dream temple In the dream realm or mysterious pillars in a nightmare! (structures dont generate fully correct yet)
## Waking up
If you find yourself stuck in a dream, fall from a high place! Falling from 7 blocks or more in a dream will wake you up.

Mod made with mcreator
